subject: Where is my order?
body_text: Hi there, I placed order #12345 last week and still haven't received it. Can you tell me when it will arrive? Thanks, John

subject: Terrible experience! Want refund
body_text: This is the worst product I've ever bought. It broke after 2 days. I want my money back immediately. This is unacceptable.

subject: Quick question about sizing
body_text: Hi team, I'm interested in buying your jacket but I'm not sure about the sizing. I'm usually a medium in most brands but saw your size guide says to size up. What do you recommend?

subject: Requesting return label
body_text: Hello, I need to return order #98765. The item doesn't fit as expected. I have the original packaging. Please send me a return label.

subject: Tracking not working
body_text: The tracking link you sent me doesn't show any updates. It's been 5 days. Can you check what happened to my package? Order #45678.

subject: Product arrived damaged
body_text: My order arrived today but the box was crushed and the contents are damaged. I took photos. This is very disappointing. What can you do?

subject: Guest post opportunity
body_text: Hi, I noticed your blog and would love to write a guest post for you. We can also do link exchanges. Please reply if interested.

subject: Love your products!
body_text: Just wanted to say I love what you guys are doing. Been a customer for 2 years and recommend you to everyone. Keep up the great work!

subject: URGENT: Legal action if not resolved
body_text: This is my third email with no response. I will be contacting my lawyer and posting on all social media if you don't resolve my issue TODAY. Order #11223.

subject: Wrong item received
body_text: I ordered a blue shirt but received a red one. I need the blue one for an event next week. Can you send the correct item?

subject: Do you ship to Canada?
body_text: I'm interested in buying but I'm in Toronto. Do you ship internationally? What's the shipping cost and time?
